title: Genie Agents enhancements
body:
* **Higher character limit for uploaded PDFs**: The maximum number of characters per uploaded PDF has been raised from 4,000 to 15,000. See [PDF files](/aws/en/genie-agents/file-upload#pdf-files).
* **Agent mode APIs (Beta)**: Agent mode APIs for Genie Agents are now available in Beta. See [Agent mode APIs in Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie-agents/api).
* **Analyze files in Unity Catalog volumes (Beta)**: A Genie Agent can now analyze files stored in Unity Catalog volumes, such as PDFs, slide decks, and images. See [Attach volumes to a Genie Agent](/aws/en/genie-agents/volumes#attach-volumes).
